query:
INSERT INTO coupons (code, description, discountType, discountValue, minPurchase, usageLimit, usedCount, validFrom, validUntil, isActive, appliesToTours, appliesToProducts, appliesToRentals)
VALUES ('TRIPADVISOR-BOGO', 'Buy One Get One Free Tour - Thank you for your TripAdvisor review!', 'bogo', 100.00, 0, 1000, 0, NOW(), DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 1 YEAR), true, true, false, false);
